channel.title: Research on Hanchen's Space Bar
channel.description: Recent content in Research on Hanchen's Space Bar

item.title: We Analyzed 413,000 AI Agent Traces. Here's What Separates the Ones That Succeed.
item.description: A systematic behavioral analysis of 413K SWE agent trajectories totaling ~17 billion tokens — revealing which human SWE principles transfer to AI agents, which ones reverse, and why the most obvious analysis is dead wrong.
